title: BetterMiniSword
description: A resource pack that will change swords in Minecraft to small and minimalistic swords.
body:
**BetterMiniSword**: Small Swords

Tired of clunky swords in Minecraft that obstruct your view? The BetterMiniSword mod is for you! It replaces all standard swords with elegant and compact blades while preserving their combat power.

BetterMiniSword offers:

* Minimalism Without Compromise: Enjoy the convenience of small swords without sacrificing their effectiveness.
* Aesthetic Pleasure: The elegant blades of BetterMiniSword are pleasing to the eye and do not overload the interface.
* Full Compatibility: The mod works with all versions of Minecraft and does not conflict with other modifications.

Download BetterMiniSword and discover a world where sword size doesn't matter!
